title: Define Meshtastic-to-LICHEN compatibility contract and mapping table
description: Why this exists: firmware code needs a narrow contract that maps Meshtastic app semantics onto LICHEN local resources without implying Meshtastic RF interoperability. What needs to be done: define the adapter boundary, transport framing, protobuf message ownership, request/response mapping, error policy, and unsupported feature behavior for the MVP. Map Meshtastic node info/status/config/message/key operations to LICHEN HAL identity, local CoAP/status/config/message/key flows, or explicit unsupported errors. Acceptance criteria: mapping table is recorded in Beads notes or design field; RF protocol boundary is explicit; config/status/message flows have deterministic behavior; edge cases such as unknown protobufs, missing channels, unsupported admin operations, and app-provided position are specified.
